summary: Instant loading skeletons on ticker switch, smoother analytics open, and release notes page stability fix.
release_notes: Switching tickers now immediately clears stale news and company info with animated loading skeletons instead of showing old data while the new fetch is in flight.
Analytics dashboard defers heavy IndexedDB load to after the first paint, so the page chrome appears instantly before data is restored.
Fixed the release notes page returning an error when navigated to directly by URL.
General UI responsiveness improvements for panel transitions.
